contentBody.description: Configuring Welo’s adaptive policy engine in a sandbox.

sections.content:
⚙️ Cirrus Securely: Technical Deep Dive Enablement Program

Program Overview

The Cirrus Securely Technical Deep Dive program equips partner solution engineers, architects, and developers with the skills to design, deploy, and integrate Cirrus' cybersecurity solutions across hybrid and multi-cloud environments.
Partners will gain hands-on experience with Cirrus APIs, deployment best practices, and customer onboarding workflows to deliver secure, scalable implementations.

🎯 Program Objectives

Build technical proficiency on Cirrus' Secure Platform architecture (Zero-Trust core, DataShield, and PartnerShield APIs).
Enable partners to design secure deployment blueprints across AWS, Azure, and on-prem environments.
Validate hands-on expertise through sandbox simulations, code challenges, and solution certifications.

🔧 Enablement Tracks

TrackDescriptionOutcome
1. Platform Architecture & Security FrameworkExplore Cirrus' Zero-Trust model, identity federation, encryption pipeline, and threat telemetry layers.Certified Cirrus Architect
2. API & Integration FundamentalsLearn to authenticate, query, and automate via the Welo Partner API and Security Event Streams.API Integration Specialist Badge
3. Secure Deployment in Multi-CloudConfigure Cirrus Secure Cloud Connectors for AWS, Azure, and private clouds using IaC templates (Terraform).Multi-Cloud Deployment Badge
4. Monitoring & Incident ResponseSet up event listeners, anomaly detection dashboards, and partner alert webhooks.Security Operations Practitioner Badge
5. Technical Validation & CertificationComplete hands-on lab exercises and submit your solution design for review.Certified Technical Expert



🧠 Learning Components

Interactive Labs: Access Welo Sandbox with pre-configured tenants.
Guided Technical Workbooks: Step-by-step deployment guides with code samples.
Solution Clinics: Live Q&A sessions with Welo Security Architects.
AI-Driven Code Reviews: Automated feedback via Agentforce for Partners.
Final Capstone Project: Deploy and document a complete secure Cirrus environment.

💰 Partner Benefits

Technical Certification = Priority Co-Sell Access with Welo’s field engineering team.
Early Access to new APIs and SDKs via Welo Developer Portal.
Eligible for Advanced Partner Tier in the Welo Secure Partner Program.

📈 Success Metrics

MetricTarget
Partner SE Enrollment250+ by Q2 2026
Certification Completion70% of enrolled participants
Partner-Led Deployments+40% YoY
Support Case Reduction−25% after certification rollout
